name: vitalybe-skills
description: Personal marketplace of Claude Code plugins and skills.

plugins.name: devflow
plugins.description: Structured development task workflow: requirements to plan to code to close, with a shared multi-reviewer roster and JIRA integration.

plugins.name: workbench
plugins.description: Everyday work and home skills: git commits and local merges, varlock env schemas, logging refactors, JIRA and Obsidian tasks, personal wiki, meeting scheduling, browser-automation scripting, authoring skills into this marketplace, improving skills from a session, herdr multi-agent orchestration, and local system diagnostics (high CPU/memory and Docker container load).
